feed.title: Verity Mod verified route updates
feed.subtitle: Point-in-time checks of current Minecraft Java and Bedrock Verity project records.

entry.title: Verity horror guide added to primary navigation and creator references
entry.summary: Added the Verity horror guide to primary navigation across the site and expanded the creator reference page with copy-ready wording for Verity horror mod videos, articles, and trend explainers. No home page title, description, canonical URL, or route facts were retargeted; the change improves crawl paths and gives outreach a more specific citation target.

entry.title: Verity horror mod guide added for story and playable-route intent
entry.summary: Added a Verity horror mod guide after related query data and current SERP checks showed separate demand for Verity horror mod, Verity Minecraft horror mod, and story-versus-download explanations. The page separates the horror character, playable Java and Bedrock projects, route identity signals, feature expectations, and unsafe mirror patterns while linking back to the current download map and browser-only checker.

entry.title: July 24 evening verification refreshed official project counters
entry.summary: Refreshed the visible Verity Mod route map after checking CurseForge project pages, CurseForge file records, and the official Modrinth API. Current route records remain 8461257, 8486588, 8327253, and 8406293. Project totals at check are 1,972,599, 3,577,031, 6,292,817, and 41,627 on CurseForge; the Modrinth Verity JE project is at 191,600 and version yAt0wv1Z is at 144,543 downloads.

entry.title: API connection diagnosis selector added for 401, 429, and Ollama failures
entry.summary: Added a no-key quick diagnosis selector to the Verity Mod API connection failed page after GA4 showed it as the highest-viewed page title and GSC still included API and 429 problem intent. The selector maps provider plus symptom to next steps for Groq 401 and 429, OpenRouter errors, local Ollama failures, null replies, and text-working-but-voice-failing cases without collecting API keys or logs.

entry.title: Pocket Edition route page added for MCPE search intent
entry.summary: Added a dedicated Verity Mod MCPE and Pocket Edition route page after GSC and SERP checks showed Bedrock and MCPE demand plus a separate CurseForge Verity Pocket Edition (Be) listing. The page compares Verity BE Project 1574632, PnTMC Project 1575941, and Pocket Edition Project 1596246 by owner, file record, package type, and setup risk.

entry.title: Creator reference page added for video and article citations
entry.summary: Added a creator reference page for YouTube descriptions, articles, resource pages, Discord answers, and pinned comments. The page provides copy-safe source notes, current Verity JE, Verity BE, and PnTMC project facts, official route links, and a machine-readable data pointer without mirroring downloads.

entry.title: CurseForge route page added for Java and Bedrock project confusion
entry.summary: Added a CurseForge route guide after related rising queries included curseforge verity and curseforge verity mod. The page explains how to choose between Verity JE on Minecraft Mods, Verity BE on Minecraft Bedrock Addons, and the separate PnTMC Bedrock route by Project ID, category, file type, and current file record.

entry.title: Reality-check page added for is Verity real searches
entry.summary: Added an is Verity real page after related rising queries showed demand around what is Verity, is Verity real, and Verity Minecraft horror mod. The page separates the character and videos from current public Java and Bedrock project records, then routes users to download, Java, Bedrock, FAQ, and source-check pages.

entry.title: FAQ hub added for download, Java, Bedrock, voice, and 429 questions
entry.summary: Added a Verity Mod FAQ hub after Search Console showed long-tail demand around verity-5.7.3.jar, Bedrock, NeoForge, Java download, and 429 troubleshooting. The page links players to the matching download, Java, Bedrock, API, talk, voice, and file-checker routes without changing the home page title or mirroring downloads.

entry.title: VerityPack checked as a separate modpack route
entry.summary: Checked the CurseForge VerityPack project after it appeared in Verity download SERPs. It is a separate Forge 1.20.1 modpack profile by Sarelsana, Project ID 1587394, with VerityPack-1.20.1.zip and 111,309 downloads at check. It should not be treated as the same artifact as Verity JE, Verity BE, or a Bedrock MCADDON.

entry.title: July 24 verification keeps the same current Verity file records
entry.summary: Verity JE record 8461257, Verity BE record 8486588, PnTMC record 8327253, and Pocket Edition record 8406293 are the current checked routes. Point-in-time project totals are 1,972,599, 3,577,031, 6,292,817, and 41,627 on CurseForge; the official Verity JE Modrinth project is at 191,600. These counters are popularity signals, not unique-user or safety claims.

entry.title: Verity BE 1.0.9 adds local text-to-speech and new interactions
entry.summary: Checked record 8486588: Verity (Stable) (1.0.9)-(26.3).mcaddon for Bedrock 26.30, displayed size 19.70 MB. The maintainer release notes add local TTS controls, pickup and throw interactions, progression changes, and reliability fixes. Project total at check: 3,456,204 downloads.

entry.title: Verity JE 5.7.3 now has a verified Modrinth route and publisher checksum
entry.summary: Checked Modrinth project on1Y0osD and version yAt0wv1Z: verity-5.7.3.jar, Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1, 246481139 bytes. The official API publishes SHA-1 and SHA-512 fingerprints for local file comparison.

entry.title: Verity JE 5.7.3 is the current Forge 1.20.1 route
entry.summary: Checked record 8461257: verity-5.7.3.jar, Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1, displayed size 235.06 MB. Project total at check: 1,778,387 downloads.

entry.title: Verity BE Stable 1.0.8 was the checked Bedrock route on July 22
entry.summary: Checked record 8420981: Verity (Stable) (1.0.8)-(26.3#).mcaddon for Bedrock 26.30, displayed size 18.80 MB. Project total at check: 3,362,730 downloads.

entry.title: PnTMC Verity 2.1.0 remains a separate Bedrock 26.30 route
entry.summary: Checked record 8327253: ThatMob's Verity 2.1.0 by PnTMC for Bedrock 26.30, displayed size 35.45 MB. Project total at check: 5,945,425 downloads.
